meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no coding experience. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup for Non-Coders
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills setup to build SaaS products without coding experience. A high-level guide for founders using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Bridging the gap between non-technical founders and production-grade software requires leveraging Claude Code as an autonomous engineer. By integrating Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative implementation, you eliminate the need for manual syntax management, allowing you to focus entirely on product-market fit and revenue-generating features.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is paved with founders who waited for a 'technical co-founder' or spent months learning syntax while the market window slammed shut. You don't need to be a developer to ship; you need to be an architect who understands how to orchestrate AI agents to build your vision. 

We are entering the era of the 'AI-native founder.' By mastering the synergy between your conceptual design and the raw power of Claude Code, you transform from a passive observer into a formidable product engineer. This guide strips away the academic fluff, focusing purely on the mechanics of building, deploying, and monetizing your software.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Define your application's domain model and database schema to ensure the AI has a clear blueprint before writing a single line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a CTO. Generate a high-performance database schema and folder structure for a SaaS boilerplate using Next.js, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS. Focus on modularity and authentication readiness.

steps.title: Environment Orchestration
steps.description: Configure the development environment to ensure Claude Code has persistent access to your project files and environment variables.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure .env.example file and a configuration script that validates environment variable presence for Supabase and Stripe integration.

steps.title: Iterative Feature Implementation
steps.description: Break down your product roadmap into atomic feature requests to maintain high code quality and avoid context drift.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Break down the 'User Dashboard' feature into 5 distinct sub-tasks: Auth-check, Profile-fetch, Subscription-status-display, Data-grid, and Empty-state-handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Implement the Auth-check sub-task based on the provided schema"

steps.title: Automated Testing & QA
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write and run unit tests to ensure that new features do not break established core functionality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest unit tests for the newly created profile-fetch component, ensuring edge cases like null data are handled gracefully.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Run all tests and fix any failing assertions in the /components directory"

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline Setup
steps.description: Configure your CI/CD pipeline to push your validated code to production seamlessly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow file that runs tests on push and deploys to Vercel if all tests pass.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'Context Document' (CONTEXT.md) in your root folder that Claude Code can reference for your project's coding standards and style guide.
Use 'claude reset' frequently to clear the session memory if the AI starts hallucinating or repeating patterns during long-running tasks.
Enforce modularity by requesting that every new feature be placed in its own folder with a dedicated index.ts file to prevent monolithic file bloat.
When Claude Code gets stuck on a syntax error, provide the specific error log from your terminal rather than describing the problem in your own words.
Prioritize 'Read-Only' mode for your documentation files to prevent the AI from overwriting your project requirements during implementation.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, begin tracking user telemetry and iterate on the feedback loop. Use Claude Code to implement A/B testing variables directly into your codebase to optimize for conversion.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the roadmap to outbuild teams ten times your size without writing a single line of manual code. The only barrier left is your own execution speed. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
